subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath sent down unto them that have quaffed the chalice of utterance, despite the peoples of creation, and have drunk in His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم للذین اخذوا کاس البیان رغما لاهل الامکان و شربوا باسم
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
